entries.source: Important events, facts learned, and uncertainty notes stay visible.
entries.value: Fanann imeachtaí tábhachtacha, fíricí foghlamtha, agus nótaí éiginnteachta infheicthe.

entries.source: In 4 sentences, explain how one assumption change moves revenue, cash flow, and value. Name one thing you would check before trusting it.
entries.value: I 4 abairt, mínigh conas a bhogann athrú amháin ar thoimhde ioncam, sreabhadh airgid agus luach. Ainmnigh rud amháin a sheiceáilfeá sula gcuirfeá muinín ann.

entries.source: Increase the challenge. Have the historical person defend their worldview more forcefully while the historian tracks weak claims.
entries.value: Méadaigh an dúshlán. Iarr ar an bpearsa stairiúil a dearcadh ar an domhan a chosaint níos láidre agus an staraí ag rianú maíomh lag.

entries.source: Individual crowd interactions are plausible composites
entries.value: Is cumaisc inchreidte iad idirghníomhaíochtaí aonair sa slua

entries.source: Individual routes through smoke are plausible, not exact
entries.value: Tá bealaí aonair tríd an deatach inchreidte, ní beacht

entries.source: Interpret the target internally and begin immediately with a real diagnostic question.
entries.value: Léirmhínigh an sprioc go hinmheánach agus tosaigh láithreach le fíorcheist dhiagnóiseach.

entries.source: Invite a figure into the room.
entries.value: Tabhair cuireadh do phearsa isteach sa seomra.

entries.source: It definitely rises because sales are higher.
entries.value: Ardaíonn sé go cinnte mar go bhfuil díolacháin níos airde.

entries.source: It helps you explain profit potential, not just market size.
entries.value: Cabhraíonn sé leat acmhainneacht bhrabúis a mhíniú, ní méid an mhargaidh amháin.

entries.source: It helps you predict policy, taxes, shortages, and market reactions without memorizing diagrams.
entries.value: Cabhraíonn sé leat beartas, cánacha, ganntanais agus frithghníomhartha margaidh a thuar gan léaráidí a chur de ghlanmheabhair.

entries.source: It is impossible to know anything until terminal value is calculated.
entries.value: Ní féidir aon rud a bheith ar eolas go dtí go ríomhtar luach deiridh.

entries.source: It lets you revise for logic, not just polish wording.
entries.value: Ligeann sé duit athbhreithniú a dhéanamh ar an loighic, ní ar snas na bhfocal amháin.

entries.source: It makes you faster because each test either proves or removes a hypothesis.
entries.value: Déanann sé níos tapúla thú mar cruthaíonn nó baineann gach tástáil hipitéis.

entries.source: It may fall because costs and working capital can absorb the sales gain.
entries.value: D'fhéadfadh sé titim mar is féidir le costais agus caipiteal oibre an gnóthachan díolacháin a shlogadh.

entries.source: Jumps to valuation before reading the operating model.
entries.value: Léimeann sé go luacháil sula léann sé an tsamhail oibriúcháin.
Bhí tábhacht mhíleata ag Kashmere Gate

entries.source: Keep governance, money, labor, technology, and culture in view.
entries.value: Coinnigh rialachas, airgead, saothar, teicneolaíocht agus cultúr i radharc.

entries.source: Keep the sidecar quieter unless something needs correction.
entries.value: Coinnigh an painéal taobh níos ciúine mura bhfuil rud éigin le ceartú.

entries.source: Kingdom of England under Charles II
Kingdom of France in revolutionary crisis
entries.value: Ríocht na Fraince i ngéarchéim réabhlóideach
Cuireann teanga agus éide riosca in iúl
Súil siar ag deireadh an tsaoil roimh bhás

entries.source: Learn how they thought, worked, planned, wrote, governed, or experimented.
entries.value: Foghlaim conas a cheap siad, a d'oibrigh siad, a phleanáil siad, a scríobh siad, a rialaigh siad nó a rinne siad turgnaimh.

entries.source: Learn supply and demand by working through examples
entries.value: Foghlaim soláthar agus éileamh trí shamplaí a oibriú tríd
Mhúnlaigh stádas dlíthiúil an saol laethúil

entries.source: List what has to be true for the idea to work.
entries.value: Liostaigh cad is gá a bheith fíor chun go n-oibreoidh an smaoineamh.

entries.source: Listing the five labels without judging their strength does not explain whether the industry is attractive.
entries.value: Ní mhíníonn liostú na gcúig lipéad gan a neart a mheas an bhfuil an tionscal tarraingteach.

entries.source: Literate helper near records, letters, or multilingual exchange
entries.value: Cúntóir liteartha in aice le taifid, litreacha nó malartú ilteangach

entries.source: Livres, sous, bread prices as daily pressure
entries.value: Livres, sous, agus praghsanna aráin mar bhrú laethúil

entries.source: Local working language with class-appropriate fluency
entries.value: Teanga oibre áitiúil le líofacht a oireann don aicme

entries.source: Lock useful notes only after the idea has been used.
entries.value: Glasáil nótaí úsáideacha tar éis don smaoineamh a bheith úsáidte amháin.

entries.source: Look for the causal link. Which variable actually changed, and what does it affect next?
entries.value: Cuardaigh an nasc cúiseach. Cén athróg a d'athraigh i ndáiríre, agus cad a imríonn sí tionchar air ina dhiaidh sin?

entries.source: Make the first rough structure before giving advice. Start with: "I made the first rough structure. Edit anything. I will react to your changes."
entries.value: Déan an chéad struchtúr garbh sula dtugann tú comhairle. Tosaigh le: "Rinne mé an chéad struchtúr garbh. Cuir aon rud in eagar. Freagróidh mé do do chuid athruithe."

entries.source: Manipulation proves you can use the model, not just repeat it.
entries.value: Cruthaíonn láimhseáil gur féidir leat an tsamhail a úsáid, ní í a athrá amháin.

entries.source: Map allies, enemies, critics, patrons, and pressure groups around this person at this moment.
entries.value: Mapáil comhghuaillithe, naimhde, léirmheastóirí, pátrúin agus grúpaí brú timpeall an duine seo ag an nóiméad seo.
Is cumaisc iad carachtair an mhargaidh

entries.source: Market street near Chandni Chowk during the siege
entries.value: Sráid mhargaidh gar do Chandni Chowk le linn an léigir

entries.source: market, household, workshop, port, school, or neighborhood
entries.value: margadh, teaghlach, ceardlann, calafort, scoil nó comharsanacht

entries.source: Markets move when incentives change. Demand captures willingness to buy, supply captures willingness to sell, and price is where the pressure balances.
entries.value: Bogann margaí nuair a athraíonn dreasachtaí. Gabhann éileamh toilteanas ceannach, gabhann soláthar toilteanas díol, agus is é an praghas an áit a gcothromaítear an brú.

entries.source: Markets, homes, workshops, courts, maps, and decision points.
entries.value: Margaí, tithe, ceardlanna, cúirteanna, léarscáileanna agus pointí cinnidh.
Máistreacht = cuimhne + cur i bhfeidhm + aiseolas + aistriú.
Mac léinn MBA ag staidéar dearadh institiúideach

entries.source: Merge the accepted changes into a clean current version, then update the decision log and open questions.
entries.value: Cumaisc na hathruithe glactha i leagan reatha glan, ansin nuashonraigh loga na gcinntí agus na ceisteanna oscailte.
Suiteáladh David de chuid Michelangelo sa bhliain 1504

entries.source: Misses become a smaller review deck
entries.value: Téann na ceisteanna caillte isteach i ndeic athbhreithnithe níos lú

entries.source: Missing the curfew or ignoring official rank can quickly become dangerous.
entries.value: Má chailleann tú an cuirfiú nó má dhéanann tú neamhaird ar chéim oifigiúil, féadfaidh sé éirí contúirteach go tapa.
Meascann sé ionadaithe le roghanna díreacha eile.

entries.source: Modern assumptions about equal citizenship would be immediately out of place.
entries.value: Bheadh toimhdí nua-aimseartha faoi shaoránacht chomhionann as áit láithreach.

entries.source: Modern talk of individual artistic genius can sound naive without patronage, guild, and civic context.
entries.value: Féadfaidh caint nua-aimseartha faoi éirim ealaíonta aonair a bheith saonta gan comhthéacs pátrúnachta, cumainn cheirde agus cathartha.

entries.source: More immersive, with tighter limits on what you can know and say.
entries.value: Níos tumthaí, le teorainneacha níos géire ar an méid is féidir leat a fhios agus a rá.

entries.source: Move carefully and notice ordinary life before judging.
entries.value: Bog go cúramach agus tabhair faoi deara an gnáthshaol sula dtugann tú breithiúnas.

entries.source: Move one control, watch the result, then explain why the output changed.
entries.value: Bog rialtán amháin, féach ar an toradh, ansin mínigh cén fáth ar athraigh an t-aschur.

entries.source: Moving every control at once makes it hard to know what caused the result.
entries.value: Má bhogtar gach rialtán ag an am céanna, bíonn sé deacair a fháil amach cad ba chúis leis an toradh.

entries.source: Moving on after recognition instead of testing recall and transfer.
entries.value: Bogadh ar aghaidh tar éis aitheantais in ionad cuimhne agus aistriú a thástáil.

entries.source: Mughal symbolic authority under rebel control, contested by the East India Company
entries.value: Údarás siombalach Mughal faoi smacht na reibiliúnach, agus East India Company á chonspóid

entries.source: Multiple explanations can help, but the proof is what you can do after reading.
entries.value: Is féidir le míniúcháin éagsúla cabhrú, ach is é an cruthúnas an méid is féidir leat a dhéanamh tar éis léamh.

entries.source: Name the input you changed, the immediate effect, and the final result.
entries.value: Ainmnigh an t-ionchur a d'athraigh tú, an éifeacht láithreach agus an toradh deiridh.

entries.source: Name the topic and your current guess. The app builds a ladder of questions, hints, evidence, and synthesis.
entries.value: Ainmnigh an topaic agus do thuairim reatha. Tógann an aip dréimire ceisteanna, leideanna, fianaise agus sintéise.

entries.source: Napoleon after Austerlitz, Ambedkar in the Constitution committee...
entries.value: Napoleon i ndiaidh Austerlitz, Ambedkar i gcoiste an Bhunreachta...

entries.source: Near Akbar's imperial complex and debate spaces
entries.value: In aice le coimpléasc impiriúil Akbar agus spásanna díospóireachta

entries.source: No full answer unless you ask.
entries.value: Gan freagra iomlán mura n-iarrann tú é.
Níl aon mhíthuiscint leanúnach ann fós.

entries.source: Nothing changes unless buyers' tastes change.
entries.value: Ní athraíonn aon rud mura n-athraíonn cách na gceannaitheoirí.

entries.source: Olive oil, dust, bronze, public argument, and the uneasy pride of a wounded democracy.
entries.value: Ola olóige, deannach, cré-umha, argóint phoiblí agus bród míshuaimhneach daonlathais chréachtaithe.

entries.source: One short concept chunk at a time, with examples that fit your level.
entries.value: Smután gearr coincheapa amháin ag an am, le samplaí a oireann do do leibhéal.

entries.source: One targeted question tests the current understanding.
entries.value: Tástálann ceist spriocdhírithe amháin an tuiscint reatha.

entries.source: One tight arrival, three discoveries, and a debrief stamp.
entries.value: Teacht isteach gearr cruinn, trí fhionnachtain agus stampa iarchomhrá.

entries.source: Open the evidence drawer. Label high-confidence facts, plausible reconstructions, contested claims, and things you must not fabricate.
entries.value: Oscail tarraiceán na fianaise. Lipéadaigh fíricí ard-mhuiníne, athchruthuithe inchreidte, maímh chonspóidte agus rudaí nach mór duit gan a chumadh.

entries.source: Open the Historical Person mini app as a staged historical audience with a living dossier.
entries.value: Oscail mionaip na Pearsan Stairiúla mar lucht éisteachta stairiúil stáitsithe le sainchomhad beo.

entries.source: Openings that produce a better encounter.
entries.value: Oscailtí a chruthaíonn teagmháil níos fearr.
Barrfheabhsaíonn sé cur i láthair roimh loighic na hargóna.

entries.source: Optional: paste notes, syllabus points, or facts to prioritize
entries.value: Roghnach: greamaigh nótaí, pointí siollabais nó fíricí le cur in ord tosaíochta
Is cumaisc feasacha ar fhianaise iad gnáthcharachtair

entries.source: Ordinary reactions are plausible blends of legal and literary evidence
entries.value: Is cumaisc inchreidte d'fhianaise dhlíthiúil agus liteartha iad gnáthfhrithghníomhartha
Is athchruthú bunaithe ar an tréimhse í an ghnáthchaint
D'fhreastail Ostia ar chóras soláthair na Róimhe

entries.source: Out-of-time observer with a discreet field guide
entries.value: Breathnóir as a ré le treoir allamuigh discréideach

entries.source: Paste an article, case, or passage

entries.value: Éadaí a oireann don tréimhse agus don stádas

entries.source: Pick any topic. I will build 10 multiple-choice questions and score you as you go.
entries.value: Roghnaigh topaic ar bith. Tógfaidh mé 10 gceist ilrogha agus scórálfaidh mé thú de réir mar a théann tú ar aghaidh.

entries.source: Piety is civic, not private only
entries.value: Tá cráifeacht cathartha, ní príobháideach amháin

entries.source: Plain respectable dress with writing tools
entries.value: Éide shimplí mheasúil le huirlisí scríbhneoireachta

entries.source: Plausible ordinary life should be labelled as reconstruction
entries.value: Ba cheart gnáthshaol inchreidte a lipéadú mar athchruthú

entries.source: Point attention to the relevant part.
entries.value: Dírigh aird ar an gcuid ábhartha.

entries.source: Political language can mobilize or endanger
entries.value: Is féidir le teanga pholaitiúil daoine a shlógadh nó a chur i mbaol

entries.source: Possible gap: short run vs long run
Precise sensory mix at a given stall
entries.value: Meascán céadfach beacht ag stalla ar leith

entries.source: Preferred setting: choose a historically fitting room, court, battlefield tent, study, prison, salon, workshop, public square, or other concrete place.
entries.value: Suíomh is fearr: roghnaigh seomra, cúirt, puball catha, seomra staidéir, príosún, salún, ceardlann, cearnóg phoiblí nó áit nithiúil eile a oireann don stair.

entries.source: Prepare for a class discussion on Tata's acquisition of JLR
entries.value: Ullmhaigh do phlé ranga ar éadáil Tata ar JLR
Cuir mo smaoineamh gnólachta nuathionscanta faoi bhrú
Cuir an freagra deireanach faoi bhrú

entries.source: Printer's ink, sweat, bread queues, ironwork, and a city discovering its own force.
entries.value: Dúch clódóra, allas, scuainí aráin, obair iarainn agus cathair ag aimsiú a fórsa féin.
Cúiseanna príobháideacha taobh thiar de gach beartas
Tagann cinntí maoine agus marthanais salach ar a chéile
Is léiriú sóisialta í argóint phoiblí
Tá meáchan faicsine ag caint phoiblí

entries.source: Pudding Lane as fire begins to spread
entries.value: Pudding Lane agus an tine ag tosú ag leathadh

entries.source: Pudding Lane is associated with the outbreak
entries.value: Tá baint ag Pudding Lane le tús na tine

entries.source: Question prompts that deepen the exchange without turning it into a lecture.
entries.value: Leideanna ceiste a dhoimhníonn an malartú gan é a iompú ina léacht.
